arts.ttl: Swansea City want striker in January – Luke Williams’ side could face competition from ‘several other clubs’
arts.sum: Swansea City are in the picture to sign Wycombe Wanderers’ Richard Kone in the winter market, according to a report. The Welsh club have scored 24 goals from 22 Championship games this season and want to improve their attack for the second half of this season.
